productDisplayName: Crocs Women Crle Plterm Black Floater
description: If you expect your footwear to be extremely comfortable coupled with great looks, you've come to the right place! These platform flip flops from crocs pamper your feet all day long as you go about doing your daily chores with even greater enthusiasm. Pair them with just about any kind of casual wear for a fab look.Upper Transparent thong straps made of TPU, that extend and wrap around the heel for better support, durability and style Brand name on strap Midsole Croslite footbed with circulation nubs for a massage-like feel Brand logo embossed on footbed Outsole Non-marking, slip-resistant Croslite outsole Flex grooves for ease in walking Horizontal lugs on the forefoot and heel for better traction Small spherical lugs on the periphery of the outsole for improved grip shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
